62ead0be8c91030f69d5b942.leadin: Long before Hans Christian Anderson and the Brothers Grimm came onto the scene, this Frenchman popularized the fairy tale. For 10 points each:
62ead0be8c91030f69d5b942.leadin_sanitized: Long before Hans Christian Anderson and the Brothers Grimm came onto the scene, this Frenchman popularized the fairy tale. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this seventeenth century French author of such classics as “Cinderella,” “Tom Thumb,” and “Little Red Riding Hood.”
Perrault wrote a version of this fairy tale in which a feline with distinct footwear helps his master to win the hand of a princess.
Many of Perrault’s fairy tales were included in this collection titled for its supposed author, who may or may not have been the widow of Isaac Goose.
parts_sanitized: Name this seventeenth century French author of such classics as "Cinderella," "Tom Thumb," and "Little Red Riding Hood."
Perrault wrote a version of this fairy tale in which a feline with distinct footwear helps his master to win the hand of a princess.
Many of Perrault's fairy tales were included in this collection titled for its supposed author, who may or may not have been the widow of Isaac Goose.
answers: “Puss in Boots” [accept “Master Cat” or the “Booted Cat”]
Tales of Mother Goose [or Stories or Tales from Times Past, with Morals; accept Histoires ou contes du temps passe, avec des moralités: Contes de ma mere l’Oye]
